Solution X — what I said I wanted

I want to add a CSV export button to the reports dashboard.

The climb

  1. So I can pull the numbers into a spreadsheet.
  2. So I can share this month's figures with finance.

Problem Y — what I'm really trying to do

I need finance to see reconciled monthly figures without me hand-copying them.

Verdict

Reconsider: a scheduled email may serve the goal better than an export button.
